properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V7 V8 V9 V10

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: I sought the Lord and He answered me and delivered me from every fear

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Those who look on Him are radiant They'll never be ashamed They'll never be ashamed

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: This poor man cried and the Lord heard me and saved me from my enemies

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: the Son of God surrounds His saints He will deliver them He will deliver them

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Magnify the Lord in me come exalt His name together Glorify the Lord with me come exalt His name forever

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Taste and see that the Lord is good Oh bless us here who hides in Him

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: Oh fear the Lord Oh all you saints He'll give you everything He'll give you everything

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: Magnify the Lord with me Come exalt His name together Glorify the Lord with me Come exalt His name forever

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: Let us bless the Lord every day and night neverending praise may our incense rise

verse.name: V10
verse.lines: Like a fire, the Lord in me Come exalt His name together Glorify the Lord with me Come exalt His name forever
